evals.prompt: Use the ts-code-validation-gate skill. Explain when this gate must run and what checks it executes before review. Include concise bullet points.
evals.expected_output: States post-implementation/pre-review timing and enumerates formatting/linting, unit tests, semgrep, osv-scanner, and fallow.

evals.prompt: Use the ts-code-validation-gate skill. The previous run has needs-remediation.flag and remediation-ledger.md still contains unchecked items. What is the required gate outcome and review status?
evals.expected_output: Requires fail-closed behavior and states review is not valid until prior ledger is resolved.

evals.prompt: Use the ts-code-validation-gate skill. A run fails tests and semgrep. Describe required artifacts, remediation actions, and rerun behavior.
evals.expected_output: Mentions evidence artifacts, remediation-ledger checklist completion, and rerun requirement before review.
